query:
select extract(year from date_issued)::int4 as "year!", extract(month from date_issued)::int4 as "month!",
                  doc_type as "doc_type!", sum(amount)::bigint as "total_cents!"
           from documents
           where tenant_id = $1
             and doc_type = any($2)
             and amount is not null
             and date_issued is not null
             and date_issued >= $3
           group by 1, 2, 3
